verses.text: A wonder: 'a woman clothed with the sun,' the moon under her feet, crowned with twelve stars, travailing in birth. The woman. God's people about to bring forth the Christ.
A wonder: 'a woman clothed with the sun,' the moon under her feet, crowned with twelve stars, travailing in birth. The woman. God's people about to bring forth the Christ.
A great red dragon, with seven heads, drew a third of the stars, and stood 'to devour her child' as soon as born. The dragon. Satan waits to destroy the promised seed.
A great red dragon, with seven heads, drew a third of the stars, and stood 'to devour her child' as soon as born. The dragon. Satan waits to destroy the promised seed.
She bore 'a man child, who was to rule all nations,' caught up to God; the woman fled into the wilderness. Caught up. The child is safe with God; His people are kept.
She bore 'a man child, who was to rule all nations,' caught up to God; the woman fled into the wilderness. Caught up. The child is safe with God; His people are kept.
War in heaven: Michael fought the dragon, 'that old serpent... Satan,' who was 'cast out into the earth.' Cast down. The accuser is thrown from heaven.
War in heaven: Michael fought the dragon, 'that old serpent... Satan,' who was 'cast out into the earth.' Cast down. The accuser is thrown from heaven.
War in heaven: Michael fought the dragon, 'that old serpent... Satan,' who was 'cast out into the earth.' Cast down. The accuser is thrown from heaven.
A voice cries salvation is come; 'they overcame him by the blood of the Lamb, and by the word of their testimony.' Overcomers. The saints conquer through the Lamb's blood.
A voice cries salvation is come; 'they overcame him by the blood of the Lamb, and by the word of their testimony.' Overcomers. The saints conquer through the Lamb's blood.
Woe to the earth, for the devil 'hath great wrath... a short time'; he persecutes the woman, but she is borne to safety. Short rage. Satan's fury is fierce but brief.
Woe to the earth, for the devil 'hath great wrath... a short time'; he persecutes the woman, but she is borne to safety. Short rage. Satan's fury is fierce but brief.
Woe to the earth, for the devil 'hath great wrath... a short time'; he persecutes the woman, but she is borne to safety. Short rage. Satan's fury is fierce but brief.
The dragon casts a flood after her, but the earth helps her; enraged, he wars 'with the remnant of her seed,' who keep God's commandments. War on the saints. The devil turns on Christ's faithful.
The dragon casts a flood after her, but the earth helps her; enraged, he wars 'with the remnant of her seed,' who keep God's commandments. War on the saints. The devil turns on Christ's faithful.
